articles.author: Max Rego
articles.title: ‘This is the last warning:’ Iran radioes US during Strait of Hormuz de-mining effort: Report - The Hill
articles.description: After the U.S. military launched operations to demine the Strait of Hormuz, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) navy reportedly warned an American destroyer in the passageway. “This is the last warning. This is the last warning,” the Iranian forces r…
